'''''Star Wars'' 104''' is the one-hundred-fourth issue in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series of [[Star Wars comic books|comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Luke, Leia, Han and their friends fly to Zeltros to enlist their aid in the war against the Nagai, only to have the war follow them! "Nagais and Dolls" is written by Jo Duffy, penciled by Cynthia Martin and inked by Art Nichols''.<ref name="ma" />
